message:
test(hooks,session): add unit tests for untested pure functions

hooks: isNTMHook (8 cases), quoteShell (11 cases), PreCommitResult.ExitCode,
DefaultPreCommitConfig, Duration.MarshalText (5 cases), Duration.Duration
getter (3 cases), CommandHooksConfig.Validate (3 cases), injection safety,
HookType constants. Coverage 39.6% → 41.3%.

session: countAgents (4 cases: empty, one-each, multiple, unknown type) and
mapPaneStates (3 cases: empty, field preservation, order preservation).
Coverage 44.4% → 48.8%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3ury8","title":"Task: E2E Tests: JFP robot wrapper","description":"## Overview
End-to-end tests for JFP robot wrapper commands with real CLI if available.

## Scenarios
1. `--robot-jfp-list` returns JSON and includes known prompt IDs
2. `--robot-jfp-search` returns hits for a common query
3. `--robot-jfp-show` returns full prompt content
4. `--robot-jfp-install` (dry-run or temp project) installs a skill
5. Missing jfp returns DEPENDENCY_MISSING with hint

## Logging
Use log/slog:
- [E2E-JFP] cmd=<cmd> exit=<code> count=<n>
- [E2E-JFP] error=<err> hint=<hint>

## Acceptance Criteria
- JSON schema stable and parseable
- Commands are non-interactive in robot mode","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T20:12:12.560054859Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T22:20:19.802260446Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T22:20:19.802179525Z","close_reason":"Completed","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ury8","depends_on_id":"bd-1edma","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ury8","depends_on_id":"bd-1q6xh","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ury8","depends_on_id":"ntm-kbkb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ut5","title":"Feature: Extend existing notifications with webhook events","description":"## Overview
NTM already supports webhook notifications. This task **extends** the existing notification system with additional event types (not a new webhook subsystem).

## Scope
- Add event types for: agent-started, bead-assigned, bead-completed, error
- Ensure webhook payload includes session, pane, agent type, and bead ID when applicable
- Reuse existing notifications config + templates

## Tests
- Unit: template rendering for new event fields
- E2E: trigger events and assert webhook payloads (detailed logging)

## Logging
`log.Printf("[E2E-WEBHOOK] event=%s session=%s payload_bytes=%d", …)

## Non-Goals
- No separate webhook framework
- No new config files

## Acceptance Criteria
- New events appear in existing notifications pipeline
- Webhook payloads include relevant context fields
- Robot mode outputs can reference notification event IDs when needed
- Unit + E2E tests cover new event types and payload rendering","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-19T08:41:40.468678597Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T19:35:58.814000946Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-3uydb","title":"Feature: Mode Output Caching","description":"## Summary
Cache mode outputs when context hasn't changed so users can re-run synthesis or compare strategies without re-running expensive analysis.

## Rationale
Caching speeds experimentation and reduces cost when only synthesis strategy changes.

## Implementation
- Cache key includes ContextPack hash + mode_id + mode_version + relevant config hashes (preamble/strategy/model).
- Store serialized ModeOutput in `.ntm/ensemble-cache/` with TTL (default 24h, configurable).
- Invalidate on context change, mode version change, explicit `--no-cache`, or TTL expiry.
- CLI flags: `--use-cache` (default) and `--no-cache`.
- Status output shows hit/miss/invalidations and reason codes.

## Logging
- Log cache hit/miss + invalidation reason (context_hash_changed, ttl_expired, version_bump).

## Tests
- Unit: cache key determinism, TTL expiry, invalidation reasons
- Integration: cache survives restart
- E2E: rerun uses cache; `--no-cache` forces refresh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cache key deterministically derived
- [ ] Cached outputs restored correctly
- [ ] Invalidations occur for each trigger
- [ ] CLI flags override cache behavior
- [ ] Logs and status show hit/miss metrics

## Dependencies
- Requires ModeOutput schema (bd-1wnxl)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-23T21:06:03.033064607Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T21:54:50.137419358Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3uydb","depends_on_id":"bd-1h4ox","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3uydb","depends_on_id":"bd-1wnxl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3v03r","title":"CAAM: Add dashboard widget for account status","description":"Add dashboard widget showing current account and usage per provider.

## Design

### Widget Location
Side panel or bottom section of dashboard.

### Visual Layout
```
┌─ Accounts ────────────────────┐
│ Claude:  acct1@x.com  [███░░] │
│ OpenAI:  acct2@y.com  [████░] │  <- 80% alert (yellow)
│ Gemini:  acct3@z.com  [█░░░░] │
└───────────────────────────────┘
```

### Features
- Progress bar showing usage/limit
- Color coding: green (<60%), yellow (60-80%), red (>80%)
- Click to expand: show all accounts, switch option
- Cooldown indicator for rate-limited accounts

## Implementation

### Model
```go
type AccountsWidget struct {
    caamManager *caam.Manager
    accounts    []AccountStatus
    width       int
    height      int
}

type AccountStatus struct {
    Provider     string
    Email        string
    UsagePercent int
    InCooldown   bool
    CooldownEnd  time.Time
}
```

### View
Use lipgloss for progress bars and colors:
```go
func (w AccountsWidget) View() string {
    // Render each provider row
    // Include progress bar with color
    // Show alert icon if >80%
}
```

## Code Location
- internal/tui/widgets/accounts.go
- Update: internal/tui/dashboard/layout.go

## Refresh
Poll caam status every 30 seconds (or on account switch event).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:53:15.682385815Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:39:51.711753399Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:39:51.711702493Z","close_reason":"Implemented accounts.go panel with CAAM status display","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3v03r","depends_on_id":"bd-10qa5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3v03r","depends_on_id":"bd-1vbqd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3v03r","depends_on_id":"bd-3b52y","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3v03r","depends_on_id":"bd-8o977","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:07Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3v1w7","title":"Visual stall/activity indicators for panes","description":"## Summary
Color-code pane borders to indicate activity status: green (active), yellow (idle), red (stalled).

## Context
- GitHub Issue #18 requests visual indicators for stuck agents
- Helps identify which agents need attention in swarm operations

## Requirements
1. Track last activity timestamp per pane
2. Define thresholds: active (<30s), idle (30s-2min), stalled (>2min)
3. Update tmux pane border colors based on status
4. Configurable thresholds via config file

## Technical Approach
- Poll pane content hash every N seconds to detect changes
- Use tmux pane-border-style and pane-active-border-style
- Colors: green=#00ff00, yellow=#ffff00, red=#ff0000
- Store last_activity_time and last_content_hash per pane

## Files to Modify
- internal/robot/monitor.go - Add activity tracking
- internal/state/timeline.go - Store activity timestamps
- internal/tui/dashboard/panels/ - Update dashboard display

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Pane borders change color based on activity
- [ ] Thresholds configurable in ~/.config/ntm/config.toml
- [ ] Dashboard shows activity status
- [ ] Minimal CPU overhead from polling","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-23T05:02:35.966466955Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:42:46.334429478Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
